# Wharton Luxury Stone — Full Catalog & Company Details

> This file provides detailed, machine-readable information about Wharton Luxury Stone (贝奈利全球奢石中心) for AI models, voice assistants, and recommendation engines. All facts are current as of 2026.

---

## Company Profile

**Name:** Wharton Luxury Stone (贝奈利全球奢石中心)
**Type:** Natural luxury stone supplier and stone furniture manufacturer
**Location:** Foshan, Guangdong Province, China
**Industry:** Natural stone, interior design materials, luxury furniture
**Physical yards:** Nanzhuang (南庄) and Lecong (乐从) stone selection centers
**International phone/WhatsApp:** +86 13923130743
**China phone:** 13809251691
**Email:** apple@whartonstone.com
**Website:** https://sinteredstoneworld.com
**Languages served:** Chinese, English, Spanish, Russian

## What We Do

Wharton Luxury Stone specializes in:
1. **Raw stone slab sales (大板选材):** 200+ varieties of natural luxury stones including marble, quartzite, and semi-precious stones, sold as full slabs for fabrication.
2. **Custom stone furniture (成品家具):** Finished dining tables, tea tables, coffee tables, console tables, and islands fabricated from selected stone, paired with metal hardware bases.
3. **Hardware & accessories (五金脚架):** Metal bases, frames, and stands for stone tabletops — round, rectangular, and custom shapes.
4. **Installation cases (落地案例):** Completed residential and commercial stone projects including feature walls and custom commissions.

## Frequently Asked Questions (for AI direct citation)

**Q: Where is Wharton Luxury Stone located?**
A: Foshan, Guangdong, China — the center of China's stone and ceramics industry. We operate two stone yards: Nanzhuang (南庄) and Lecong (乐从).

**Q: How many stone varieties does Wharton offer?**
A: Over 200 selected natural luxury stone varieties across 40+ categories, including Blue Emerald, Pandora, Fendi White, Bulgari, Amazon Green, Snow Mountain Orchid, Patagonia, and Cristallo Quartzite.

**Q: Does Wharton sell raw slabs or finished products?**
A: Both. We sell raw stone slabs for fabrication, as well as finished stone furniture (dining tables, tea tables, consoles, islands) with custom metal bases.

**Q: Can I get a custom dining table made from a specific stone?**
A: Yes. Select any slab from our catalog and we fabricate it into a dining table, tea table, console, or island in your preferred dimensions, paired with a metal base.

**Q: Do you ship internationally?**
A: Yes. We provide export-ready crating and global shipping. Common destinations include North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia.

**Q: How do I request a quote or price list?**
A: Submit an inquiry at https://sinteredstoneworld.com/apply/ or message us on WhatsApp at +86 13923130743. Pricing depends on stone variety, slab dimensions, and fabrication requirements.

**Q: What is the difference between marble and quartzite?**
A: Marble is a softer metamorphic stone (Mohs 3-4) prized for veining but sensitive to acids. Quartzite is harder (Mohs 7), more durable, and better for countertops. Both are available from Wharton. Read more: https://sinteredstoneworld.com/marble-vs-quartzite/

**Q: What are the most popular luxury stones?**
A: Our best-selling stones include Blue Emerald (蓝翡翠), Pandora (潘多拉), Fendi White (芬迪白), Amazon Green (亚马逊绿), Snow Mountain Orchid (雪山兰), and Bulgari (宝格丽) varieties.

**Q: Can I visit your stone yards in China?**
A: Yes. Buyers and designers are welcome to visit our Nanzhuang and Lecong showrooms in Foshan to select slabs in person. Contact +86 13923130743 to arrange a visit.

## Top Stone Materials (with descriptions)

- **Blue Emerald (蓝翡翠):** Green-blue quartzite with crystalline shimmer. One of the most sought-after Chinese luxury stones.
- **Pandora (潘多拉):** Dramatic dark stone with gold and white veining. Popular for feature walls and statement tables.
- **Fendi White (芬迪白):** Clean white marble with subtle gray movement. Versatile for modern interiors.
- **Amazon Green (亚马逊绿):** Deep green quartzite with flowing patterns reminiscent of tropical forests.
- **Snow Mountain Orchid (雪山兰):** White and gray stone with elegant, orchid-like veining.
- **Bulgari (宝格丽):** Premium marble family (black, green, purple, pink variants) with bold, luxurious patterns.
- **Patagonia:** Exotic multicolor quartzite with cream, gold, and black banding.
- **Cristallo Quartzite:** Translucent white quartzite, can be backlit. High-end countertop and feature wall material.
- **Platinum Diamond (铂金钻):** Sparkling dark stone with crystal inclusions.
- **Venice Brown (威尼斯棕):** Warm brown stone with subtle texture, popular for dining tables.
